item.description:
🚀 VE v26.4.25

What's new in this release:

  • Enhance Sparkle dialog handling in SoftwareUpdater
  • Enhance SoftwareUpdater screen handling for Sparkle dialogs
  • Refactor localization strings and update SoftwareUpdater for Sparkle integration
  • saram url
  • chanegd assembly
  • changed to sarvam
  • meeting changes
  • Update WebSocket URLs in ChatManager and BaseURLService for production environment
  • Refactor localization strings and enhance inbox scrolling behavior
  • Update RoutineFormModal to reflect AI Call terminology
  • Refactor EmailBodyWebView to remove dark mode handling and improve HTML rendering
  • Enhance chat functionality and improve paste handling
  • meeting isuse fix
  • Redesign ConnectedIntegrationModal and GranolaAPIKeyModal to match Figma specifications; enhance ConnectorsView with improved layout and search functionality. Implement caching for connected integrations in ConnectorsService to optimize API calls.
  • Update localization strings, enhance UnifiedInboxView, and improve AuthManager workflow

🚀 VE v26.4.24

What's new in this release:

  • 26.4.23
  • edeg case
  • Update WebSocket URLs to production endpoints
  • popup chnages
  • feat(chat): update thinking phrases and improve user feedback during processing
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs for unified audio services
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs to new production endpoint
  • feat(activity-pipeline): capture VE app activity like any other app
  • feat(inbox): add Figma-exported icons and improve header pill functionality
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs and improve error handling
  • audio stable
  • feat(routines): add phone number notification feature in RoutineFormModal and update routing for deep links
  • change development toggle
  • handled page only showing page icon if presend, handled showing a cold start fallback, handled image picker not showing issue
  • feat(localization): add theme showcase entry and improve error handling in prediction flow

🚀 VE v26.4.23

What's new in this release:

  • edeg case
  • Update WebSocket URLs to production endpoints
  • popup chnages
  • feat(chat): update thinking phrases and improve user feedback during processing
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs for unified audio services
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs to new production endpoint
  • feat(activity-pipeline): capture VE app activity like any other app
  • feat(inbox): add Figma-exported icons and improve header pill functionality
  • fix(websocket): update WebSocket URLs and improve error handling
  • audio stable
  • feat(routines): add phone number notification feature in RoutineFormModal and update routing for deep links
  • change development toggle
  • handled page only showing page icon if presend, handled showing a cold start fallback, handled image picker not showing issue
  • feat(localization): add theme showcase entry and improve error handling in prediction flow
  • refactor(settings): update Phone OTP modal and phone number field for improved user experience and validation

🚀 VE v26.4.22

What's new in this release:

  • feat(localization): enhance localized strings and improve inbox read state handling
  • feat(cards): add informational overlay to AskVeCard and FnHoverCard
  • fix(widgets): correct actions-hub base URL + route through BaseURLService
  • feat(chat): implement dynamic placeholder updates for chat input fields
  • feat(localization): update and enhance localized strings for improved clarity
  • design(proactive): acted-card state in the list
  • fix(widgets): refetch the domain list after a widget executes
  • design + persist(widgets): calmer disclosure, neutral expiry, on-disk state
  • design(detail): restore priority + labels, auto-mark-read on open
  • design(proactive): report disclosure, selection rail clip, filter unify
  • refactor(localization): streamline suspended account messaging and enhance UI consistency
  • feat(notifications): enhance user experience by managing restricted states and updating UI components
  • crash repot fix
  • design(detail): inline close × with favourite/delete row
  • design(proactive): restrained Apple-grade redesign of card + panel

🚀 VE v26.4.21

What's new in this release:

  • chore(sidebar): drop standalone Search nav item
  • feat(proactive-cards): Ask AI opens chat page for card's sessionId
  • feat(proactive-cards-tab): redesigned card detail sidebar + list search/filters
  • Implement suppression logic for FloatingWindowController when Unified Inbox is active
  • Refactor widget positioning logic for improved user experience
  • Refactor pill positioning logic for improved visibility
  • Allow AskVe card to coexist with meeting card (stacked)
  • Show "Meeting ended" in pill mode (missing handoff)
  • Pill priority: meeting > instructionFlow so AskVe card coexists
  • Enhance loading experience with skeleton views
  • Refactor loading indicators to use skeleton views
  • Concurrent meeting + Ctrl-hold: route to AskVe card; label meetingEnd
  • Add skeleton loading view for recent meetings
  • Pill meeting-icon tap: mirror menu-bar Quick Note nav chain
  • Fix pill icon clicks: add missing .onTapGesture

🚀 VE v26.4.11

What's new in this release:

  • added the pdf preview
  • Update dictation state checks and sound playback logic for improved user experience
  • changes
  • Handle feature error during instruction recording for improved error management
  • Add condition to check dictation state in active view update logic for improved content visibility
  • Set default value of usePillMode to false for improved initial user experience
  • Add dictation hint state and update related logic for improved user guidance
  • Implement auto-send confidence feature in IntentMailView
  • resolve the issue
  • Enhance routine execution fetching with meeting prep support
  • Add Customize settings page with display style toggle; refactor MyProfileView to remove old toggle implementation
  • Refactor draft instructions in IntentMailView and update localization
  • Clamp pill position within screen bounds during drag; update position saving logic for improved usability
  • Enhance pill UI to display meeting bars during active states; update listening and dictation phases for improved visibility
  • fix: remove buggy idle accumulator that caused 4-hour stale startTime

🚀 VE v26.4.08

What's new in this release:

  • Add focus handling for title input in MeetingSummaryView and optimize proactive cards rendering in RoutineListView. Implement workspace switch observer in RoutinesViewModel to clear cached data on workspace change.
  • Remove unused PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup entries from project.pbxproj to streamline project structure and improve maintainability.
  • Refactor report skeleton in RoutineDetailView to improve layout and visual consistency. Introduced a new sectionSkeleton function for better organization of bullet items and descriptions, enhancing the overall user experience in both light and dark themes.
  • Refactor RoutineDetailView to utilize WKWebView for rendering execution reports, enhancing performance and consistency with chat views. Introduced a new RoutineReportWebView component for markdown rendering, and improved loading states with skeleton views. Updated RoutineExecutionsSidebar to use LazyVStack for better performance and simplified execution row handling. Added CSS and HTML resources for report styling and rendering.
  • Update KeyboardMonitor thresholds for quick tap, double tap, and dictation hold delays to improve responsiveness. Add debug trace logs for instruction key handling in KeyboardMonitor and InstructionService to aid in troubleshooting. Enhance error handling in SubscriptionService to prevent logging of cancelled requests.
  • delete proactive card
  • proactive card
  • Refactor badge integration checks in ChatContentView to ensure case-insensitive comparison for connected app types. This improves the accuracy of badge visibility and unconnected integrations display.
  • added basic chat edit
  • Enhance subscription management by adding localized messages for renewal prompts and updating UI components to reflect subscription status. Modify ConnectorsView and TeamMembersView to disable actions when the subscription is expired, and ensure appropriate feedback is provided to users. Update SettingSidebar to show a trial ended card when applicable.
  • fixed meeting is showing chat listening issue
  • Enhance VEAIViewCoordinator with inline side effects for state setters, improving responsiveness and user experience. Update health monitoring in LowLevelKeyTap to ensure event tap reliability. Modify subscription checks in DictationService and MeetingService to include warning UI, enhancing user feedback during limit checks.
  • Update showTodoListInFloatingWindow logic to handle specific chat sessions from normal chat settings, enhancing user experience by directing to the appropriate chat window.
  • Enhance VEAIViewModel to observe changes in the active todo list from ChatManager, updating the dynamic notch width accordingly. Update matters.swift to adjust extra width for both floating chat and normal chat todo indicators.
  • Enhance dependency injection for Auth and Subscription services across multiple managers and services. This refactor improves testability by allowing for easier substitution of dependencies in production and testing environments. Additionally, introduce a Combine publisher for `authState` in `AuthManaging` to facilitate reactive UI updates. Update related code to utilize these new patterns, ensuring consistent access to authentication and subscription states.

🚀 VE v26.4.06

What's new in this release:

  • Hand Notification Api call
  • trash UI
  • Trash Feature
  • Add hover effect to settings icon in sidebar
  • added in shortcut handler cmnd + K
  • changed the chat history alignment
  • cmnd + k tabs defined
  • Cmnd K shortcut files fixed
  • Team Members View color change
  • white and dark mode tool tip
  • handled showing voice instructions response inside chat if app is focused
  • Tool Tip Visible Instantly
  • wip voice instruction inside chat
  • Websocket and Hand Notification
  • Crash report to web slack

🚀 VE v26.4.04

What's new in this release:

  • race condition fix
  • limit pop up
  • Upgrade Link
  • chat style and log
  • fieldId in file paylaod
  • Notch Login fixed
  • Refactor onboarding flow to improve user experience. Added a delay before displaying the onboarding window and centered it on the main screen. Enhanced logging for onboarding completion and early closure scenarios.
  • logs
  • Implement onboarding step for cloud storage feature and update versioning logic. Added StorageView component and adjusted onboarding flow to include storage step. Updated onboarding version to 5 and improved user detection for existing users.
  • check
  • fixed chatbar layout
  • changes
  • Live URL
  • sub plans
  • Updated the share option

🚀 VE v26.3.31

What's new in this release:

  • Loaders fixed
  • Added gallery creation on enter button
  • Refactor ChatMessageBubble to simplify attachment filtering; implement chat session renaming functionality in SettingSidebar and ChatManager; enhance chat UI with smooth scrolling and animation effects in chat.css and chat.js.
  • feat: add ChromeNativeHostInstaller + cleanup VeMindService
  • refactor: remove VeMindService - saves now via extension API
  • Added search functionality
  • Bugfix gallery
  • Refactor ChatView and TodoListView for improved layout and scrollbar handling; add feedback functionality in ChatWebView. Update styles in chat.css and todo.css for consistency and responsiveness.
  • transversal
  • Converted Stack to Heap Memory
  • Updated the tag deletion api
  • check
  • Grid layout
  • Merge with master
  • cc

🚀 VE v26.3.26

What's new in this release:

  • feat: enhance MemoryGalleryView to manage viewer state during album switching and improve user experience
  • chore: comment out placeholder buttons in MemoryMultiSelectionBar for future implementation
  • feat: implement GalleryVisitorsView and enhance MemoryGalleryView with AI face recognition and upload limit handling
  • fixed the stream end todo is not canceling issue
  • chore: update binary library libve_local_store.a
  • feat: update DictationSuccessView to display elapsed duration with improved formatting
  • feat: implement DictationTimeline for enhanced tracking of dictation events and UI updates
  • feat: enhance dictation timing tracking and UI updates for improved user experience
  • reduced the scroll bar width, updated the scrolled to bottom button styles
  • feat: add watermark deletion functionality and improve image positioning in MemoryGalleryView
  • fixed logout not clearing chat data
  • feat: add new localization string and update ComputerUseOverlayController
  • questionire ui fixes
  • feat: enhance ComputerUseOverlay functionality and improve error handling
  • feat: enhance sharing functionality and improve memory view interactions

🚀 VE v26.3.19

What's new in this release:

  • fixed location
  • action blocks
  • fix: update WebSocket URLs to use production endpoint
  • feat: enhance localization strings and improve WebSocket message handling
  • fix: update WebSocket URLs to use development endpoint
  • feat: forward userReply and signalContext to orchestrator via WebSocket
  • fix: add AppKit import for NSApp
  • fix: re-activate app after computer_use to keep WebSocket alive
  • fix: ignore heartbeat messages from backend
  • fix: correct comment to reflect PNG encoding
  • perf: make WebSocket idle timeout configurable, set 30 min for agent sockets
  • fix: Update WebSocket URLs to use new production endpoint for super agent API
  • perf: fix computer use screenshot encoding and sleep prevention
  • feat: Enhance PasteHelper functionality to support multiple downloadable file URLs
  • perf: increase WebSocket max message size to 10 MB

🚀 VE v26.3.18

What's new in this release:

  • feat: Expand PasteHelper to support a wider range of downloadable file types
  • feat: Enhance PasteHelper and UnifiedAudioSocketClient for smart pasting
  • feat: Enhance ComputerUseService to capture per-action screenshots
  • feat: Enhance performance in Chat and EscEventTap managers
  • refactor: Improve immediate response handling in DesktopToolRouter
  • refactor: Simplify screen analysis logic in SessionMonitor
  • 301
  • chekc -300
  • fix: Update MultiAgentSocketClient to handle stream end without answer, adjusting display phase and clearing bar
  • connector dynamic log and remove shared url
  • refactor: Update FloatingBarView layout and enhance MultiAgentSocketClient message handling
  • chore: Update WebSocket URLs and project version
  • feat: Enhance chat functionality with stop streaming feature and UI improvements
  • feat: Add processing check for SuperAgentSocketClient in WebSocketRegistry
  • refactor: Simplify token refresh handling in SuperAgentSocketClient

🚀 VE v26.3.12

What's new in this release:

  • auto scroll meeetings
  • Revert "Merge branch 'bugfix/folder-animation' of https://bitbucket.org/veaiinc/ve-macos-desktop-app/src/master"
  • Enhance MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService to support custom album sorting. Preserve API order for gallery albums and implement optimistic UI updates during drag-and-drop operations. Update customSortIndex handling in GalleryAlbumSummary for better state management.
  • Add content shapes to various buttons and views in MemoryGalleryView and MemoryView for improved touch target areas. Refactor album cover logic to ensure proper display based on gallery cover conditions.
  • Thinking Step
  • chat session
  • New Version Changes chat and auto update and error slack
  • fixed issue
  • Refactor MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService to improve thumbnail loading and error handling. Added logging for gallery cover image loading and updated cover image retrieval logic in FoldersService. Ensured SwiftUI re-evaluates thumbnail properties upon loading completion.
  • 26.3.11
  • Websocket
  • 26.3.10
  • Fix meeting audio not starting with built-in mic override
  • Defer audio engine configuration to avoid Bluetooth A2DP→HFP switch
  • Add visual widget when built-in microphone override is active

🚀 VE v26.3.11

What's new in this release:

  • Websocket
  • 26.3.10
  • Fix meeting audio not starting with built-in mic override
  • Defer audio engine configuration to avoid Bluetooth A2DP→HFP switch
  • Add visual widget when built-in microphone override is active
  • fix: apply Bluetooth A2DP override to DictationService and InstructionService
  • fix: apply Bluetooth A2DP override to MeetingService
  • fix: preserve Bluetooth A2DP audio quality during voice capture
  • feat: implement Sentry error monitoring in macOS desktop app
  • Prediction Timer
  • summary fall bakc and google meet detection logic
  • Combine
  • Adjust font sizes in MeetingHoverWidget for improved readability
  • Add theme manager to various views and apply preferred color scheme
  • fix generate time issue

🚀 VE v26.3.10

What's new in this release:

  • Fix meeting audio not starting with built-in mic override
  • Defer audio engine configuration to avoid Bluetooth A2DP→HFP switch
  • Add visual widget when built-in microphone override is active
  • fix: apply Bluetooth A2DP override to DictationService and InstructionService
  • fix: apply Bluetooth A2DP override to MeetingService
  • fix: preserve Bluetooth A2DP audio quality during voice capture
  • feat: implement Sentry error monitoring in macOS desktop app
  • Prediction Timer
  • summary fall bakc and google meet detection logic
  • Combine
  • Adjust font sizes in MeetingHoverWidget for improved readability
  • Add theme manager to various views and apply preferred color scheme
  • fix generate time issue
  • divider commet
  • push to master meeting

🚀 VE v26.2.24

What's new in this release:

  • Smooth notch
  • Meetings
  • Meeting
  • Meeting Progress
  • Refine onboarding process by implementing enhanced state management and logging. Introduce isShowingOnboarding flag to prevent race conditions and ensure proper handling of restricted users. Update WebSocket connection to send isNewOnboarding as a separate header. Improve microphone monitoring cleanup during window closure and minimize events.
  • Enhance onboarding flow by introducing restricted state detection and handling. Update WebSocket connection to include isNewOnboarding parameter for restricted users. Modify showMicrophoneEducationOnly method to accept restricted user flag. Clear restricted onboarding flag upon completion in multiple views.
  • added esc handling and error handling
  • UserName
  • Refactor onboarding and restricted state handling in AppDelegate and PrivacyConnectorsView. Ensure onboarding is prioritized and re-check restricted states after completion. Update logging for better diagnostics.
  • mic input issue resloved
  • fixed ui
  • upcoming event changes
  • fixed issue with markdown rendering
  • changes Notch
  • added auto focus

🚀 VE v26.2.23

What's new in this release:

  • 23 release
  • Auto update padding
  • Auto Update
  • feat: implement auto-growing text area for chat input with multi-line support
  • Enhance MemoryGalleryView to validate online status before sharing
  • Add notify feature to MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService
  • Refactor FoldersService for improved download handling and directory management
  • Enhance MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService for improved download preferences management
  • Enhance MemoryGalleryUploadView and MemoryGalleryView for improved tag management
  • fix: prevent text selection issue by deselecting text after key press in Dictation and Prediction services
  • Update FoldersService to pad downloaded data to expected size
  • Enhance MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService for improved tag handling and slug validation
  • Implement gallery and album slug availability checks in MemoryGalleryView and MemoryView
  • Update MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService for enhanced gallery functionality
  • Refactor MemoryGalleryView and FoldersService for improved layout and coordinate handling

🚀 VE v26.2.16

What's new in this release:

  • Reapply "Merge branch 'test/a'"
  • Solved
  • Revert "Logs 1"
  • Revert "Merge branch 'test/a'"
  • Notch Matter
  • Release
  • Logs 1
  • Prevented Sleep and Screen
  • Onboard View
  • check
  • Curosr Position message removed
  • Onboarding view Theme color
  • ui changes and edge cases fix in meetings
  • Release
  • Release

🚀 VE v26.2.15

What's new in this release:

  • Logs 1
  • Prevented Sleep and Screen
  • Onboard View
  • check
  • Curosr Position message removed
  • Onboarding view Theme color
  • ui changes and edge cases fix in meetings
  • Release
  • Release
  • fix it
  • Refactor PrivacyConnectorsView to ensure the onboarding window is only displayed during an active onboarding session, improving user experience by preventing unnecessary window pop-ups.
  • Refactor PrivacyConnectorsView to streamline onboarding process by removing the "Skip" button and updating the "Continue" button text to "Finish" when an integration is connected, enhancing user clarity and experience.
  • docs: add .env.example and CLAUDE.md for AI readiness
  • Refactor ControlKeyEducationView and DictationKeyView to toggle recording state with updated button text and disable button when no shortcut is available. Enhance user experience by providing clear actions based on recording status.
  • ui done dynamic transcription height

🚀 VE v26.2.14

What's new in this release:

  • Release
  • fix it
  • Refactor PrivacyConnectorsView to ensure the onboarding window is only displayed during an active onboarding session, improving user experience by preventing unnecessary window pop-ups.
  • Refactor PrivacyConnectorsView to streamline onboarding process by removing the "Skip" button and updating the "Continue" button text to "Finish" when an integration is connected, enhancing user clarity and experience.
  • Refactor ControlKeyEducationView and DictationKeyView to toggle recording state with updated button text and disable button when no shortcut is available. Enhance user experience by providing clear actions based on recording status.
  • ui done dynamic transcription height
  • Enhance TryPredictionView and TryVoiceIntentView with reply text area, auto-focus functionality, and improved layout. Adjust padding and color consistency for better visual clarity.
  • Update onboarding views for improved clarity and consistency in text, adjust padding, and enhance theme color usage across multiple components.
  • Remove unused intentMail image assets and associated JSON configuration
  • Refactor onboarding views to use cached assets and dynamic key name in text
  • Onboard Finish Functinality
  • Update OnboardingProgressIndicator to use secondary text color for completed steps
  • Fixed The Outllok issue
  • Revert "Onoard check"
  • Onboard

🚀 VE v26.2.12

What's new in this release:

  • added animation to border
  • added loader ans changed rendering animations
  • added loader
  • fix: prevent initial audio engine reconfiguration when observing microphone preference changes
  • feat: Enhance caret poking to preserve modifier flags and mark synthetic events, which LowLevelKeyTap now ignores, while also refactoring modifier key detection and ensuring audio session starts before recording.
  • changed colors for gradient
  • Added Log View
  • added markdown ui in answer widget
  • Removed Fonts and Resources Folder
  • Appcast
  • 26.2.10
  • Font
  • changes
  • changes
  • 26.2.9

🚀 VE v26.2.10

What's new in this release:

  • 26.2.10
  • 26.2.9
  • Implement loading skeleton view in InstructionsView to enhance user experience during data loading. Display a full skeleton when instructions are being loaded, ensuring consistent visual feedback across the application.
  • Enhance loading views across DictionaryView, LogsView, and VoiceView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading. Adjust layout and styling for consistency and better visual feedback.
  • Refactor Dictionary and Voice services to streamline word management by consolidating parameters for add and update operations. Update UI components to reflect changes in data structure, enhancing user experience and consistency across the application.
  • Curosr Detetcion
  • New Changes
  • checking
  • Add new color set for SurfaceInverse and update font styles across various components for improved consistency and readability.
  • Hold Feature
  • Enhance loading view in IntentMailView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading.
  • Update font styles and padding in IntentMailView for improved consistency and readability.
  • Remove unused GeneralSans font files and adjust AppLogoView for improved icon scaling and layout consistency.
  • Refactor font usage in ToastView and HomeView components to utilize predefined styles from ThemeManager. Removed font registration logic from ThemeManager and updated skeleton view dimensions for better layout consistency.
  • Logs Appearnce

🚀 VE v26.2.9

What's new in this release:

  • Implement loading skeleton view in InstructionsView to enhance user experience during data loading. Display a full skeleton when instructions are being loaded, ensuring consistent visual feedback across the application.
  • Enhance loading views across DictionaryView, LogsView, and VoiceView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading. Adjust layout and styling for consistency and better visual feedback.
  • Refactor Dictionary and Voice services to streamline word management by consolidating parameters for add and update operations. Update UI components to reflect changes in data structure, enhancing user experience and consistency across the application.
  • Curosr Detetcion
  • New Changes
  • checking
  • Add new color set for SurfaceInverse and update font styles across various components for improved consistency and readability.
  • Hold Feature
  • Enhance loading view in IntentMailView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading.
  • Update font styles and padding in IntentMailView for improved consistency and readability.
  • Remove unused GeneralSans font files and adjust AppLogoView for improved icon scaling and layout consistency.
  • Refactor font usage in ToastView and HomeView components to utilize predefined styles from ThemeManager. Removed font registration logic from ThemeManager and updated skeleton view dimensions for better layout consistency.
  • Logs Appearnce
  • Voice Logs
  • Voice Logs

🚀 VE v26.2.8

What's new in this release:

  • Implement loading skeleton view in InstructionsView to enhance user experience during data loading. Display a full skeleton when instructions are being loaded, ensuring consistent visual feedback across the application.
  • Enhance loading views across DictionaryView, LogsView, and VoiceView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading. Adjust layout and styling for consistency and better visual feedback.
  • Refactor Dictionary and Voice services to streamline word management by consolidating parameters for add and update operations. Update UI components to reflect changes in data structure, enhancing user experience and consistency across the application.
  • Curosr Detetcion
  • New Changes
  • checking
  • Add new color set for SurfaceInverse and update font styles across various components for improved consistency and readability.
  • Hold Feature
  • Enhance loading view in IntentMailView with detailed skeleton UI elements for improved user experience during data loading.
  • Update font styles and padding in IntentMailView for improved consistency and readability.
  • Remove unused GeneralSans font files and adjust AppLogoView for improved icon scaling and layout consistency.
  • Refactor font usage in ToastView and HomeView components to utilize predefined styles from ThemeManager. Removed font registration logic from ThemeManager and updated skeleton view dimensions for better layout consistency.
  • Logs Appearnce
  • Voice Logs
  • Voice Logs

🚀 VE v26.2.7

What's new in this release:

  • Release
  • removed the window shadow
  • fixed loader
  • Update background colors in WorkspaceConnectorsView for improved visual consistency and hierarchy.
  • Refactor UI components in Settings views to improve styling and consistency. Removed unused SVG assets and adjusted background colors for better visual hierarchy. Added keyboard shortcut for settings access.
  • feat: Display text input caret on screenshots, improving accuracy for Electron/Chromium apps.
  • Own App and Commented out Notch Tab
  • Remove background styling and overlay from sidebar button in SettingsView
  • Changes
  • refactor: ensure dictation targets external applications and broaden app activity extraction scope by removing validation and sidebar isolation.
  • HIde Logic
  • Cursor Detection
  • Cursor Active
  • ui completed
  • Refactor InstructionRowView: Simplify button layout and adjust hover opacity

🚀 VE v26.2.6

What's new in this release:

  • Script
  • Build Version
  • Changes made
  • Release script
  • Release 26.2.1
  • list knowledgebase api update
  • Socket
  • feat: implemented the knowledge based view
  • Curosr Cooldown
  • Curosr detetction
  • When cursor is there show notch
  • Entitleemts
  • Window Redirection Solved
  • Window Redirection Issue Solved
  • fixed bar is auto opening when resart issue

🚀 VE v26.2.5

What's new in this release:

  • Build Version
  • Changes made
  • Release script
  • Release 26.2.1
  • list knowledgebase api update
  • Socket
  • feat: implemented the knowledge based view
  • Curosr Cooldown
  • Curosr detetction
  • When cursor is there show notch
  • Entitleemts
  • Window Redirection Solved
  • Window Redirection Issue Solved
  • fixed bar is auto opening when resart issue
  • refactor: reimplement dictation metadata extraction with a faster AXUIElement walk and remove textbox text.

🚀 VE v26.2.4

What's new in this release:

  • Changes made
  • Release script
  • Release 26.2.1
  • list knowledgebase api update
  • Socket
  • feat: implemented the knowledge based view
  • Curosr Cooldown
  • Curosr detetction
  • When cursor is there show notch
  • Entitleemts
  • Window Redirection Solved
  • Window Redirection Issue Solved
  • fixed bar is auto opening when resart issue
  • refactor: reimplement dictation metadata extraction with a faster AXUIElement walk and remove textbox text.
  • fixed mic auto-select issue

🚀 VE v26.2.3

What's new in this release:

  • Release 26.2.1
  • list knowledgebase api update
  • Socket
  • feat: implemented the knowledge based view
  • Curosr Cooldown
  • Curosr detetction
  • When cursor is there show notch
  • Entitleemts
  • Window Redirection Solved
  • Window Redirection Issue Solved
  • fixed bar is auto opening when resart issue
  • refactor: reimplement dictation metadata extraction with a faster AXUIElement walk and remove textbox text.
  • fixed mic auto-select issue
  • Sync with Web Api Intent Mail
  • feat: Extract names and sidebar content for dictation from the active window in parallel.

🚀 VE v26.2.2

What's new in this release:

  • Release 26.2.1
  • list knowledgebase api update
  • Socket
  • feat: implemented the knowledge based view
  • Curosr Cooldown
  • Curosr detetction
  • When cursor is there show notch
  • Entitleemts
  • Window Redirection Solved
  • Window Redirection Issue Solved
  • fixed bar is auto opening when resart issue
  • refactor: reimplement dictation metadata extraction with a faster AXUIElement walk and remove textbox text.
  • fixed mic auto-select issue
  • Sync with Web Api Intent Mail
  • feat: Extract names and sidebar content for dictation from the active window in parallel.

🚀 VE v26.1.44

What's new in this release:

  • chore: remove the Icons
  • fix: solve image upload issue
  • feat: added intent model section
  • Fetch_Onboard will be called on early-access
  • changed url
  • feat: Update HomeView to conditionally display help section and refactor IntentMailView for improved intent model handling; enhance HomeService to utilize dictation count in usage statistics
  • updated the response handling
  • handled esc
  • prevented the duplicate sessions
  • resolved restrict diction while prediction
  • handled 404 status
  • handled ui response
  • feat: Improve HomeView loading state handling and enhance HomeService with date formatting for usage statistics queries
  • Toggle Issue Solved
  • added white mask

🚀 VE v26.1.43

What's new in this release:

  • API Integration for connectors
  • Revert "check"
  • check
  • Notch Open and Hide
  • changed ui
  • added mic ui and functionality
  • resloved closed notch in open screen and added key in diction
  • sending used text to prediction on enter key down
  • Commenedted Out Notion,Teams,CLickup Integration
  • Refactored VEAIApp.swift
  • Quit Issue Solved
  • Update Preferences Toast
  • early-access Refresh
  • Release 42
  • Commented out Home Tab

🚀 VE v26.1.42

What's new in this release:

  • Commented out Home Tab
  • Script changes
  • Block Prediction and dicttaion when Update banner is shown
  • Notch updates
  • Add Home tab view and related models/services
  • Intercom Logging
  • resloved bluetooth connected build in mic use
  • showing on top of fullscreen
  • Intercom change
  • added update ui
  • Release
  • Fixed
  • Add window title retrieval to AppHelper and update UnifiedAudioService to include it in payload
  • fixed prediictionText bug
  • Intercom chnage version

🚀 VE v26.1.41

What's new in this release:

  • Script changes
  • Block Prediction and dicttaion when Update banner is shown
  • Notch updates
  • Add Home tab view and related models/services
  • Intercom Logging
  • resloved bluetooth connected build in mic use
  • showing on top of fullscreen
  • Intercom change
  • added update ui
  • Release
  • Fixed
  • Add window title retrieval to AppHelper and update UnifiedAudioService to include it in payload
  • fixed prediictionText bug
  • Intercom chnage version
  • notch voice detection and error handling
